auth-service.title: auth-service
auth-service.tagline: Authentication, sessions, 2FA, OAuth, audit log surface.
extraEnv: JWT_SECRET — HS256 signing key for access tokens
JWT_REFRESH_SECRET — HS256 signing key for refresh tokens
JWT_2FA_TEMP_SECRET — HS256 signing key for the 2FA temp token
AUTH_INTERNAL_SECRET — shared secret peer services use on /auth/oauth/login
ENCRYPTION_KEY — AES key encrypting per-user TOTP secrets at rest
GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID / GOOGLE_CLIENT_SECRET — optional, enables Google OAuth
GITHUB_CLIENT_ID / GITHUB_CLIENT_SECRET — optional, enables GitHub OAuth
endpoints: POST /auth/login — sign in; returns tokens or `requires2FA`
POST /auth/refresh — exchange refresh token for fresh access token
POST /auth/email/send-verification — request a fresh verification email
POST /auth/oauth/login — internal endpoint for NextAuth callback
GET POST PUT DELETE /roles — role CRUD (`dev:config:edit`)
GET /audit/stats — top actions / users / modules with errors
GET /audit/security-report — failed-login IPs, 403 spikes, old sessions (`dev:config:edit`)

rh-service.title: rh-service
rh-service.tagline: Human Resources: employees, departments, vacations, schedules, payroll docs.
extraEnv: AUTH_INTERNAL_SECRET — used to validate access tokens locally
endpoints: GET POST /vacations — request and list vacations

projects-service.title: projects-service
projects-service.tagline: Project management: kanban, sprints, time tracking.
endpoints: GET POST PATCH DELETE /projects/:id/tasks — kanban tasks

support-service.title: support-service
extraEnv: REDIS_URL — required for Socket.IO Redis adapter

payments-service.title: payments-service
payments-service.tagline: Subscriptions, payments, plans, coupons, Mercado Pago webhooks.
extraEnv: MP_WEBHOOK_SECRET — used to verify incoming webhook signatures
endpoints: POST /payments — initiate Pix or card payment

license-service.title: license-service
license-service.tagline: Software licensing: products, client bindings, activation tokens.
endpoints: POST /clients/:userId/products — bind a product to a client (`licenses:clients:bind`)
POST /activations — verify a token (called by client SDK)

developer-service.title: developer-service
developer-service.tagline: Internal ops console: docker services, queues, logs, config, VPS Hostinger.
extraEnv: HOSTINGER_API_TOKEN — Bearer token for the Hostinger VPS API

notification-service.title: notification-service
notification-service.tagline: User notification feed + SSE push, Redis-backed pub/sub.
